name: Flamingo Beach
description: Pink flamingos roam freely among sunbathers — one of the Caribbean's most iconic photo spots. Not a public beach — requires hotel stay or purchased day pass.

rockiness.beach: White sand in a protected private-island bay 🏖️

live_rating.water_quality_note: Provisional estimate — not lab-tested; live water quality later

characteristics.depth_profile: Calm protected bay on private island — shallow sandy bottom.
characteristics.access: Boat from Renaissance Wind Creek Resort; day pass for non-guests
characteristics.facilities: Full service — bar, restaurant, chairs included with access
fun_facts: Pink flamingos roam freely among sunbathers — one of the Caribbean's most iconic photo spots.
Not a public beach — requires hotel stay or purchased day pass.
